101.Content:
Bane Lord has become a source of corruption, eroding every corner of the world with Void Corruption Power!


Monsters chosen by Bane Lord awaken as <color=#ffcd97>Void Hosts</color>, gaining three enhanced abilities and evolving over time!

During battles in Chaotic Realm, the seasonal entry <color=#ffcd97>Void Corruption</color> activates rhythmically like a heartbeat. Every skill cast is a battle against the environment!

Beware! Bane Lord may directly tear open the battlefield as a <color=#ffcd97>Dimensional Observer</color>, invading player dimensions in Chaotic Realm! 
Will the party facing Bane Lord survive his devastating Void Corruption Power? Let's wait and see!

102.Content: Increase your Season Title to unlock exclusive Emblems. Enhancing emblems boosts power this season to better face all challenges!

103.Content: A maid outfit infused with technology, suitable for combat and stylish enough to show off futuristic fashion. Claimable after you purchase the Void Pass I and raise it to Level 30.

104.Content: Alloy Armor with detachable gauntlets and greaves. Cold metal surfaces shimmer with golden energy circuits. Curves redesigned with bionic spine mechanics for precise joint fit. A perfect fusion of mechanical aesthetics and ergonomics.

105.Content: In the stillness of the night, they walk the edge between light and shadow. Every movement, breath, and emotion is swallowed by the darkness, only to deliver fate's verdict in silence. Claimable after you purchase the Void Pass II and raise it to Level 30.

201.Content:
Adventurers who enter the Drowning Dreamlands will experience hallucinations, seeing monsters that exist only in their minds.


Drifting Cocoons can be found in the wild. Touch one to enter the Drowning Dreamlands.

In the Drowning Dreamlands, your Hallucination Value steadily grows. When it reaches maximum, you will be forced out of the Drowning Dreamlands.

After the Hallucination Value reaches maximum, you enter the Lost state. During its duration, you cannot re-enter the Drowning Dreamlands.

Different Drowning Dreamlands induce hallucinations at different intensities. The higher the adventurer's Deep-Slumber Psychoscope Level, the slower the Hallucination Value increases.

202.Content:
The Drowning Dreamlands have invaded the Chaotic Realm. Their immense power plunges adventurers into a Dreamflood, subjecting them to harsher challenges.

After interacting with a spatial investigation device, Dreamflood Value will slowly increase over time.
Defeating monsters also builds Dreamflood Value. The stronger the monster, the more it adds.

When Dreamflood Value reaches maximum, a Dreamflood Manifestation will appear. This is a powerful creature, and defeating it grants significant combat buffs.

Dreamflood Manifestations come in 4 different forms, each testing the adventurer's abilities in different ways. Manage your Dreamflood Value in real time to avoid prolonged battles.

Beware! The mischievous Nappo may sneak into the adventurer's plane, causing all kinds of trouble! 
Can you stay calm when faced with sudden "scares"? Let's wait and see!

203.Content: Take on the new season's achievements, raise your season Title, and prove your strength for all to see! \nNew seasonal system: Deep‑Slumber Psychoscope with flexible and diverse build options.

204.Content: Purchase the Dream Pass I and reach Lv.30 to obtain the limited-edition Love & Remembrance set.

205.Content: Participate in seasonal Features and reach the title rank "Visionary Guest I" to obtain the limited-edition White Night Combatwear set!

206.Content: Purchase the Dream Pass II and reach Lv.30 to obtain the limited-edition Nocturnal Romance set.

207.Content: Purchase the Dream Pass III and reach Lv.30 to obtain the limited-edition Dreams & Illusions set.

301.Content:
In the new season, Adventurers will be able to combat hallucinations with greater ease, gradually tearing open the boundary between illusion and reality.


New Class:
Twin Striker
Dominates the combat rhythm with high-frequency combos, building a solid defense with a unique self-healing mechanism that balances damage and sustain.


New Illusion Factors:
Inspiration Factor: Builds energy acquisition.
Reality Factor: Grants bonuses upon acquiring energy.

302.Content:
The Illusion invasion has mutated the planes. Strange echoes drift through the Chaotic Realm, making it difficult to distinguish real sensations.

When in combat, Echo Residue will slowly increase. This growth rate speeds up while challenging bosses.

Defeating monsters and triggering special events will also grant Echo Residue.

When Echo Residue is full, all players receive an Exaltation Anthem buff that enhances combat attributes.

In Master Mode, you can actively consume Echo Residue to start the anthem and trigger the buff early. However, this will strengthen nearby monsters affected by Seed of Illusion, and reward extra points upon their defeat.

The Squeaky Boarlet might take the opportunity to slip into the Adventurer's plane, hammering out chaotic beats with off-key notes while it waits for someone to play with.

303.Content: Take on the new season's achievements, raise your season Title, and prove your strength for all to see!\n\nDeep-Slumber Psychoscope has been reset and restructured. Choose Inspiration and Reality Factors to create your own build!

304.Content: Purchase the Season Pass I and reach Lv.30 to obtain the limited-edition Stellar Navigator set.

305.Content: Participate in seasonal Features and reach the title rank "Chaotic Variations I" to obtain the limited-edition Backlight Command set!
